# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Validation

- [ ] `mise run fmt`
- [ ] `mise run lint`
- [ ] `mise run typecheck`
- [ ] `mise run test`
- [ ] `mise run check`
- [ ] `mise run ci`

## Security impact

- [ ] No security impact
- [ ] Security impact assessed and documented

## Rollback plan

Describe how to revert safely if needed.
